notes: Run 4 on 2026-02-24. Task2 done: fixed #365 (custom attrs on nested erased types - PR created). Fix is in tryConvConstructorRefToTgt (try/catch) and tryConvCustomAttributeDataToTgt (skip unresolvable attrs). Tasks still not run: task3 (improvements), task4 (deps update), task5 (maintain PRs - new PRs #426, #428, #430, #431), task9 (welcome - no new contributors), task10 (forward).
